references.text: Ito, Y, SR Yadav, YS Chang, S Tagane, P Li & T Ohi-Toma. 2021. Molecular species delimitation reveals underestimated diversity in the tree genus Nothapodytes (Icacinaceae). Plant Systematics and Evolution 308: 1-11.
Sleumer, H. 1971. Icacinaceae. Flora Malesiana series 1, 7: 1-87

species.citation: Turcz. , Bull. Soc. Imp. Naturalistes Moscou 27 (1854) 281 ; Sleumer, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 7 (1971) 70.
species.distribution: Borneo, India, Indochina, Java, Malay Peninsula, ?Moluccas, Myanmar, Philippines, Sulawesi, Sumatra, Thailand. PALAWAN.

species.citation: Merr. , PJS 3c (1908) 241 ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 492; Sleumer, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 7 (1971) 71.
species.distribution: Borneo, Moluccas, Philippines, Sulawesi. BALABAC, BASILAN, BILIRAN, BOHOL, CEBU, GUIMARAS, JOLO, LEYTE, LUZON: Sorsogon, MASBATE, MINDANAO: Surigao, MINDORO, NEGROS, PALAWAN, PANAY, ROMBLON, SIBUYAN.
species.notes: Throughout the Philippines. Lowland thickets, edge of forests, also secondary growth. 0-200(-1525)m.

genera.last_edited: Last edited by Pieter B. Pelser, 4 November 2017

species.citation: (Hemsl.) Sleumer , Notizbl. Bot. Gart. Berlin-Dahlem 15 (1940) 243 ; Fl. Males. ser. 1, 7 (1971) 50; ≡ Stemonurus megacarpus Hemsl. , Bull. Misc. Inform. Kew 1895 (1895) 133.
species.distribution: New Guinea, Pacific Ocean, Philippines, Solomon Isls, Sulawesi. PALAWAN.

genera.last_edited: Last edited by Pieter B. Pelser, 25 May 2018

species.citation: Blume , Rumphia 4 (1849) 37 ; Sleumer, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 7 (1971) 79. = Miquelia cumingii Baill. , Adansonia, 1st Sér. 10 (1872) 278 ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 492; Type: Cuming 1378.
species.distribution: Borneo, Philippines, Sulawesi, Sumatra. BATAN, LEYTE, LUZON: Albay, Benguet, Cagayan, Quezon, MINDANAO: Davao Oriental, MINDORO, NEGROS, SAMAR, SIARGAO.

species.citation: Merr. , PJS 14 (1919) 416 ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 493; Sleumer, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 7 (1971) 78; Type: BS 32885 Ramos.
species.distribution: Endemic to the Philippines. LUZON: Ilocos Norte.
species.notes: Lowland forest. Only known from the type collection.

species.citation: Merr. , PJS 14 (1919) 312 ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 493; Sleumer, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 7 (1971) 78; Type: BS 14674 Ramos.
species.distribution: Endemic to the Philippines. BOHOL, CAMIGUIN, CEBU (photos).

genera.last_edited: Last edited by Pieter B. Pelser, 2 July 2024

species.citation: (J.Graham) Mabb. , Bot. Hist. Hort. Malabaricus (1980) 189 ; Sleumer, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 9 (1982) 566; ≡ Premna nimmoniana J.Graham , Cat. Pl. Bombay (1839) 155; Type: from India. = Nothapodytes foetida (Wight) Sleumer , Notizbl. Bot. Gart. Berlin-Dahlem 15 (1940) 247 ; Fl. Males. ser. 1, 7 (1971) 55; ≡ Stemonurus foetidus Wight , Icon. Pl. Ind. Orient. (Wight) 3 (1845) t.955.
species.distribution: Cambodia, India, Myanmar, Philippines, Ryukyu Isls, Sri Lanka, Sumatra, Taiwan, Thailand. LUZON: Ilocos Norte, Isabela.

species.citation: (Matsum.) Yu Ito , Pl. Syst. Evol. 308 (2021) 3: 9; ≡ Mappia insularis (Matsum.) Hatus. , Sci. Bull. Agric. Div. Univ. Ryukyu 3 (1956) 24; ≡ Mappia ovata var. insularis Matsum. , Bot. Mag. (Tokyo) 15 (1901) 55; Type: from Taiwan.
species.notes: Ito et al. (2021) indicate that this species if possibly present in the northern part of the Philippines, but no specimens were cited.

genera.last_edited: Last edited by Pieter B. Pelser, 21 July 2024

species.citation: (Blume) Blume , Rumphia 4 (1849) 36 ; Sleumer, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 7 (1971) 86; ≡ Gynocephalum macrophyllum Blume , Bijdr. fl. Ned. Ind. (1825) 483. = Phytocrene blancoi (Azaola) Merr. , PJS 2c (1907) 432 ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 492; ≡ Kadsura blancoi Azaola , Fl. Filip., 2nd Ed. (1845) 594. var. caudigera (Sleumer) Sleumer, Blumea 17 (1969) 240; ≡ Phytocrene caudigera Sleumer, Notizbl. Bot. Gart. Berlin-Dahlem 15 (1940) 253. = Phytocrene obovoidea Merr., PJS 10c (1915) 322; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 492. Distribution: Borneo, Malay Peninsula, Philippines, Sumatra. MINDANAO: Agusan del Sur (photos). Native. var. macrophylla. Distribution: Java, Myanmar, Philippines, Sumatra. BILIRAN, BOHOL, LEYTE, LUZON, MINDANAO: Davao del Sur, PALAWAN, POLILLO, SAMAR. Notes: 0-1200m. Native. var. dasycarpa (Miq.) Sleumer, Blumea 17 (1969) 240; ≡ Phytocrene dasycarpa Miq., Ann. Mus. Bot. Lugduno-Batavi 3 (1867) 248. Distribution: Philippines, Sulawesi. LUZON: Ilocos Norte. Notes: 0-350m. Native.
species.distribution: Borneo, Java, Malay Peninsula, Myanmar, Philippines, Sulawesi, Sumatra. BALABAC, BILIRAN, BOHOL, CEBU (photos), LEYTE, LUZON: Apayao (photos), Aurora (photos), Batangas (photos), Ilocos Norte, Isabela, Laguna, Quezon, Rizal, Sorsogon, MINDANAO: Agusan del Norte, Agusan del Sur (photos), Bukidnon, Davao Oriental, Davao del Sur, Zamboanga del Norte, MINDORO, PALAWAN, POLILLO, SAMAR.
species.notes: Lowland thickets, secondary forests and dipterocarp forests. 0-1200m.
The type, Loher 5796, is a mixture: with leaves of Hypserpa nitida Miers (Menispermaceae) and fruits of Phytocrene macrophylla var. macrophylla.

genera.last_edited: Last edited by Pieter B. Pelser, 25 May 2018

species.citation: (Merr.) Merr. , EPFP 2 (1923) 492 ; Sleumer, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 7 (1971) 76; ≡ Freeria repanda Merr. , PJS 7c (1912) 292.
species.distribution: Endemic to the Philippines. LUZON: Bulacan, Ilocos Norte, Quezon, Sorsogon, MINDANAO: Surigao, SAMAR, SIARGAO.
species.notes: Lowland primary forests, scattered. Fl. Mar-May; fr. Sep.

species.citation: Pierre , Bull. Mens. Soc. Linn. Paris, 1st Ser. 2 (1897) 1319 ; Sleumer, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 7 (1971) 75. = Sarcostigma surigaoense Elmer , LPB 10 (1939) 3749, nom. inval., no Latin descr. = Sarcostigma philippinense Merr. , PJS 10c (1915) 276, as 'philippinensis' ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 492.
species.distribution: Borneo, Malay Peninsula, Philippines, Sumatra, Vietnam. LEYTE, MINDANAO: Agusan del Norte, SAMAR.
species.notes: Primary forests. On sandy-loam, scattered. Fl. & fr. Jan-Dec. 0-1065m.
